page_metadata.biotools__summary: DNMSO is an ontology for representing de novo sequencing results from Tandem-MS data. For the identification and sequencing of proteins, mass spectrometry (MS) has become the tool of choice and as such drives proteomics.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DNMSO is an ontology for representing de novo sequencing results from Tandem-MS data. For the identification and sequencing of proteins, mass spectrometry (MS) has become the tool of choice and as such drives proteomics.
